basics.name: Michael Wybraniec
basics.label: Product Engineer · Software Architecture · Data & AI · AWP Creator · AIE_C
basics.summary: Product Engineer (Software Architecture, Agentic AI, Data) with ten years in software product delivery, engineering strategy, and cross-functional leadership. International experience across public safety, insurance, finance, healthcare, life sciences, and AI. Comfortable bridging technical teams, product owners, and business stakeholders—from discovery to architecture and delivery. Author of the Agentic Workflow Protocol (AWP) for human–AI collaboration aligned with EU AI regulation; co-developed the Universal Data Cleaning Pipeline with AIE_C (Barcelona). Prior Accenture freelance delivery for INTERPOL; founder of ONE-FRONT and santeJS. Focus on modern data platform architecture, responsible agentic delivery, and open R&D (one-front.com/en/rnd).

work.name: ONE-FRONT
work.summary: Delivered high-impact solutions across finance, insurance, public safety, non-profit, and Web3 sectors. Led international teams and end-to-end projects focused on building reliable, scalable, and maintainable systems using modern web technologies and cloud platforms. Created and implemented the Agentic Workflow Protocol (AWP) to orchestrate human-AI collaboration, enabling 10x faster backlog management while ensuring AI Act compliance and security-first design.
highlights: Created the Agentic Workflow Protocol (AWP) — a complete methodology for orchestrating human-AI collaboration in software development, enabling 10x faster backlog management, automated story generation, and self-updating documentation.
Built and maintained MCP Server for project documentation, using TypeScript and open-source language models to help organize information and enable AI-enhanced workflows.
Orchestrated human-AI collaboration workflows, ensuring AI Act compliance, security-first AI integration patterns, and effective oversight mechanisms for AI-enhanced development teams.
Created a multilingual blog portfolio with error monitoring and easy content management, including French language support.
Led the development of a platform for an Eco Village in France, managing bookings, donations, and events with Vue 3, Laravel, and Stripe.
Designed insurance web applications for SanteVet in France, Spain, and Italy, using Vue, Nuxt, Contentful, and AWS, and helped improve deployment processes.
Developed a secure graph analysis tool for international police, using React, Elasticsearch, and SQL to provide data visualization and fast search.
Built a Web3 NFT marketplace for Aventus in the UK, using Ethereum smart contracts, React, and Node.js to enable online bidding.
Led the creation of a finance and reporting platform with QuickBooks integration and business intelligence tools, helping improve financial forecasts.
Tech Stack: TS · Vue · React · Node · GraphQL · Sentry · Nuxt · CMS · MCP · AWP · Agentic Workflows
work.description:
Product Engineer role: Orchestrating human-AI collaboration, ensuring AI Act compliance, and delivering value 10x faster through agentic workflows. System Architecture and Hands-on development, integrating modern frameworks, cloud services, and automation tools to improve performance, maintainability, and developer productivity. Projects included international deployments and multilingual support, with a strong emphasis on quality, compliance, and collaboration across business and tech teams.


Key responsibilities:
 •	Created and implemented Agentic Workflow Protocol (AWP) for human-AI collaboration orchestration
 •	Designed secure, scalable, and modular system architectures for client platforms
 •	Led development with TypeScript, Vue, Nuxt, React, Laravel, Node.js, and AWS
 •	Directed santeJS, an international dev community focused on tech debt prevention
 •	Integrated AI and open-source tools to enhance docs and dev workflows
 •	Ensured AI Act compliance and security-first design in AI-enhanced development
 •	Delivered multilingual, multi-regional web platforms with full i18n support
 •	Collaborated with stakeholders to align delivery with business strategy


Key Projects:
 • Agentic Workflow Protocol (AWP): Complete methodology for human-AI collaboration
 • Eco Village SaaS (🇫🇷): Booking, donations, and event platform — Vue, Laravel, Stripe
 • Insurance SaaS (🇫🇷 🇪🇸): Multilingual FR/ES/IT applications — Nuxt, AWS, Contentful
 • Law Enforcement Tool (🇫🇷 🇺🇸): Graph visualizations — React, Elasticsearch
 • Finance & BI App (🇫🇷): QuickBooks integration + custom dashboards
 • NFT Marketplace (🇬🇧): Real-time bidding — Ethereum, React, Node.js
 • Multilingual Blog CMS (🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇪🇸): Headless CMS with support and error tracking
work.location: Paris & Lyon, FR 🇫🇷 • London, UK 🇬🇧 • Sicuani, PE 🇵🇪

work.name: SanteVet
work.summary: As Software Architect and Frontend Strategy Lead at SanteVet, I drove a pivotal multinational transformation of the company's frontend architecture, establishing a foundation for advanced, scalable, and maintainable product development across France 🇫🇷, Spain 🇪🇸, and Italy 🇮🇹.
highlights: Planned and executed company-wide ONE-FRONT Engineering Strategy (2022–2024) for scalable frontend development.
Unified frontend architecture across regions (France, Spain, Italy) with shared components and Contentful CMS integration.
Founded and led 'santeJS', SanteVet's internal JavaScript community focused on quality, innovation, and collaboration.
Guided cross-functional DDD teams through architectural decision-making and technical migrations.
Defined a global frontend performance and refactoring roadmap to improve reliability and maintainability.
Defined and enforced Frontend Security Policy v1 (2023), improving system resilience and reducing risk.
Conducted technical audits, risk assessments, and organizational-level system improvement planning.
Led technical interviews and code reviews, supporting recruitment of high-impact engineering talent.
work.description:
Key Responsibilities:
 • Architected a unified, modular frontend system by migrating to one technology with a component bank. 
 • Design (DDD) and microservices principles, enabling significant scalability and maintainability across all regions.
 • Defined and implemented ONE-FRONT Engineering Strategy (2022–2023). This strategy optimised performance, integrated Shift Left testing, and established robust migration and frontend security policies.
 • Directed internal JavaScript community ("santeJS"), promoting knowledge sharing and continuous improvement among engineers.
 • Designed and enforced Frontend Security Policy v1 (2023), boosting system resilience and data protection.
 • Drove architectural decisions and ensured the strategic alignment of technical delivery.
 • Conducted technical interviews supporting team growth and capabilities.

Tech Stack: TypeScript, Vue 2 & 3, Nuxt 2 Bridge & Nuxt 3, Pinia, Contentful, AWS (Lambda, S3, Amplify, Cognito, REST & GraphQL APIs).

work.name: Interpol
work.summary: As a full-stack developer for Interpol via Ripjar and Accenture, I maintained a secure architecture in a scalable intelligence platform supporting European law enforcement agencies. My focus included large-scale graph analytics workflows, entity resolution, and multilingual NLP integration, enabling investigators to extract actionable insights from complex, unstructured data sources.
highlights: Engineered a modular full-stack system for large-scale graph analytics, entity resolution, and real-time visualization.
Integrated heterogeneous data sources across cloud, on-premise, and data lake architectures to support intelligence workflows.
Developed secure orchestration pipelines to automate intelligence and data enrichment processes across agencies.
Implemented natural language processing (NLP) techniques to extract actionable insights from multilingual unstructured data.
Built hardened, high-security features for sensitive on-premise deployments with strict compliance and operational requirements.
Enhanced organizational knowledge and investigative tools with interactive data interfaces and intuitive dashboards.
work.description:
Key Responsibilities:
 • Developed and maintained a secure, scalable full-stack platform used by European law enforcement agencies.
 • Designed and implemented modular front- and back-end components for intelligence data processing.
 • Built custom workflows and graph-based interfaces to support analysts in real-time decision-making.
 • Integrated hybrid infrastructure (cloud + on-prem) and supported data lake connectivity.
 • Ensured security, compliance, and operational resilience in all development pipelines.
 • Collaborated with international teams to support deployments, training, and knowledge transfer.

Tech Stack: TypeScript, React, Elasticsearch, GraphQL, SQL, NLP, hybrid cloud/on-prem infrastructure.

work.name: Inpart
work.summary: Contributed to the design and development of 'Lead Space' — a cross-platform partnering platform for the pharma and innovation industry. Focused on building fast, responsive, and intuitive UIs using modern frontend frameworks. Collaborated closely with product teams to translate user feedback into meaningful product improvements. Delivered consistent performance across web and mobile using Vue and Quasar.
highlights: Developed and maintained 'Lead Space', a lead discovery platform for global innovation partnerships in pharma and research.
Built responsive, mobile-ready UIs using Vue.js, Quasar Framework, and TypeScript for seamless web-to-mobile experiences.
Improved performance and accessibility, ensuring consistent UX across devices and platforms.
Collaborated in cross-functional agile teams, turning user needs into polished frontend components and features.
Integrated real-time user feedback and analytics to rapidly iterate on product features and UI flows.
Adopted modern frontend best practices, contributing to long-term maintainability and tech stack modernization.
Showcase: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vpfU2U0yfSg
Tech Stack: Vue.js, Quasar, TypeScript, JavaScript, Responsive Design, Agile

work.name: Uplab
work.position: Full-Stack Developer · Financial SaaS & API Integrations
work.summary: Designed and delivered a full-stack SaaS platform to automate financial reporting, tax declaration, and forecasting for Labelium. Focused on backend logic, frontend interfaces, and real-time data integrations with QuickBooks. Supported the digital transformation of affiliate marketing operations through secure, maintainable software.
highlights: Engineered a reporting and forecasting SaaS solution for tax declaration and affiliate marketing workflows.
Integrated QuickBooks API to enable real-time financial data sync, insights, and audit-ready exports.
Developed backend logic using Node.js and MongoDB for financial automation and custom reports.
Built interactive dashboards and client-facing UI components with Vue.js and jQuery.
Improved code reusability and platform stability through modular backend and frontend design.
Applied Agile practices to improve delivery speed and cross-functional collaboration.
Contributed to long-term scalability and maintainability of the platform with clean architecture.
Project: Reporting & Forecasting SaaS at Labelium – https://www.labelium.com/
Tech Stack: TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, Vue.js, jQuery, QuickBooks API, Agile, SaaS Architecture

work.name: Squirrel
work.summary: Developed a healthcare-focused web platform to streamline scheduling and doctor replacements for Hydrogen-Rempla. Built secure, scalable backend services and intuitive frontend interfaces to support medical professionals and administrative staff. Delivered production-grade software in a fast-paced agency environment.
highlights: Built a medical scheduling platform for Hydrogen-Rempla using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB.
Designed backend services for secure user data, availability, and shift management.
Created responsive frontend components with medical staff in mind, improving usability and reliability.
Implemented secure login, role-based access control (RBAC), and user permissions for medical users.
Collaborated closely with designers and stakeholders to meet healthcare-specific usability standards.
Ensured platform responsiveness and availability across devices and screen sizes.
Improved deployment workflows in collaboration with DevOps and QA teams.
Project: https://hydrogen-rempla.com/
Tech Stack: TypeScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB, REST APIs, Role-Based Access Control, Healthcare SaaS

work.name: PVH Corp.
work.position: Senior Data Analyst · Calvin Klein & Tommy Hilfiger Division
work.summary: Supported data analysis and production planning for Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger operations across Europe. Delivered insights for customer service optimization and B2B application reliability through analytics and software testing.
highlights: Performed data analysis to support production planning for Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger in the European market.
Provided 3rd-line support for outsourced customer service refund processes.
Tested internal B2B sales application built with C# to improve reliability and UX for partner interactions.
Supported logistics and planning departments with high-quality reporting and data validation.
Improved process transparency and analytics between supply chain and planning teams.

work.name: LeCancer.fr
work.summary: Built automation tools for internal database and Excel-based workflows for LeCancer.fr, a French premium oncology publisher. Focused on streamlining internal reporting and reducing repetitive manual tasks.
highlights: Automated Microsoft Excel database workflows for internal reporting and publication management.
Reduced manual work for editorial and finance teams through efficient VBA scripting and logic improvements.
Delivered lightweight reporting tools tailored to the client's oncology content pipeline.
Supported a remote team with hands-on, fast-delivery prototyping for process optimization.
Client: LeCancer.fr – French premium publisher in oncology field.

work.name: Echo-U
work.summary: Worked across IT and operations to improve technical systems, performance reporting, and cross-team collaboration. Partnered directly with directors, project managers, and team leaders to modernise infrastructure, support IT operations, and develop tools for data-driven decision-making. Also handled customer service operations with a focus on performance, escalation handling, and daily client support.
work.description:
IT Systems & Network Support
 • Designed and updated network topology plans, ensuring accurate documentation during migrations.
 • Administered LANs and internal systems, including Active Directory, local servers, and printers.
 • Created and enforced IT usage policies, managing device inventories and maintaining compliance.

Reporting & Operational Improvement
 •	Developed BPMN workflows and performance dashboards to optimize DPD service center operations.
 •	Produced BI reports for executives and operations outside the Salesforce ecosystem.
 •	Collaborated on cross-team process improvements, implementing tracking and cost-reduction initiatives.

Customer & B2B Support
 •	Delivered high-quality customer support for DPD clients via phone, email, and escalation systems.
 •	Resolved complex queries, managed escalations, and supported internal investigation procedures.
highlights: Developed BPMN flows & performance dashboards for DPD Customer Service operations.
Created non-Salesforce BI reports tailored to Executive & Operations stakeholders.
Authored IT governance policies including Hardware Usage, Inventory Control, and Network Topology.
Supported enterprise-level migration and topology redesign for network modernisation efforts.
Maintained 99.9% uptime across user-facing systems by proactively managing infrastructure and security.
Built custom Excel/VBA tools to streamline case management, improving resolution speed and data tracking.

work.name: Cisco
work.summary: Led hardware account forecasting and reporting across Cisco's global supply chain, supporting logistics and partner enablement across EMEAR, APAC, and the US. Promoted from Logistics & Operations for driving impactful process improvements and high-value metrics.
highlights: Managed Tier 2 hardware distribution metrics, forecasting, and partner training across global regions.
Improved hardware sales forecasting by +20% in Q1 2016, generating $300K in additional revenue.
Represented Cisco at the Kraków Distribution Conference (2016) for global service metrics.
Streamlined communication workflows between teams in Newcastle and Prague.
Promoted from Logistics & Operations after leading multiple successful process improvement initiatives.
Authored Cisco intranet solution to centralize EMEAR process database updates and documentation.
Coordinated global hardware logistics and implemented metrics for tracking supply chain performance.

volunteer.position: Project Lead (chef de projet) · Digital Platform for Booking, Donations & Events
volunteer.summary: Delivered a complete digital transformation for a non-profit eco-community through full-stack development of their booking, donations, and event management systems. Architected scalable, secure, and responsive web solutions to support sustainable living, community education, and international outreach. Bridged technology and purpose to empower real-world impact.
highlights: Led the full-stack development of a modular digital platform, driving 3 key systems: bookings, donations, and event management
Architected backend logic and APIs using Laravel (PHP), with strong security and data validation practices
Integrated Stripe API to handle one-time and recurring donations securely, boosting fundraising capabilities
Built mobile-first responsive user interfaces in Vue 3 with component-driven architecture for maintainability and reusability
Designed and normalized MySQL schemas to support complex data flows and user management
Implemented real-time admin dashboards and notification flows for event registrations and user tracking
Collaborated directly with non-profit leadership to translate community needs into digital features
STACK: Vue 3, Laravel, PHP, MySQL, Stripe API, RESTful APIs, Tailwind CSS, Component Architecture, Responsive Web Design

Vue.js Masterclass (Vue3, Firebase, Netlify, Analytics, SEO)

Thanks to his great JavaScript knwoledges my team was able to have a more scalable project for the future with real steps to reach our final goal. Moreover he's a strong facilitator and know how to manage links between business need and technical limitations.
references.relationship: Michael was senior to Marianne but didn't manage Marianne directly
references.position: Business Analyst || PSPO I

references.name: Juan Burgos Leon
references.reference: Michael is deeply committed to the projects he works on, demonstrating dynamism and a proactive approach in finding solutions. His profound expertise in technology and architecture ensures he stays abreast of the latest technological advancements.
references.relationship: Juan managed Michael directly
references.position: Directeur de projets chez Avanade

references.name: Ignas Tornau
references.reference: I've had the please of working with Michael at SantéVet when he was our software Architect, he's someone who consistently demonstrated a positive attitude and genuine passion for his work. His remarkable dedication to continually enhancing the technical teams across our diverse domains stands out as one of his many exceptional skills. Moreover, he always made a great effort to make people speak-up about issues they might be facing when working on the technical day-to-day tasks. This has evolved into many improvements that have shaped the ways of working within the company. He opened the door to dedicated knowledge sharing sessions within our teams which resulted in many improvements overall in our tech stack as well as our ways of working while fostering collaboration. He's an overall great person to work with, we need more of them :)
references.relationship: Michael was senior to Ignas but didn't manage Ignas directly
references.position: Freelance Full Stack Web Developer

references.name: Francisco Carlos López Jurado
references.reference: I just had the opportunity to work with Michael 6 months but it was a nice experience. We were able to work together easily although we were on remote. His knowledge about frontend side, good practises, clean code and architecture design is massive and really useful. I would recommend him without any doubt for all challenges a technical tribe can face. He has great communication skills to share his ideas clearly in an understandable way for everybody. His abilities for leadership are trustable too.
references.relationship: Francisco Carlos worked with Michael on the same team
references.position: Web Engineering Manager @ Leadtech

references.name: Marcus Wiseman
references.reference: I had the pleasure of working with Michael, on our team he served as a Software Architect. Michael consistently demonstrated exceptional technical prowess and strategic vision, significantly impacting our projects and overall success. His deep knowledge of JavaScript allowed him to translate complex business requirements into robust, scalable solutions. Michael's innovative mindset and ability to stay ahead of emerging trends provided us with a competitive edge. In addition to his technical expertise, Michael is an excellent leader and communicator, effectively conveying complex concepts to non-technical stakeholders and fostering a culture of continuous learning within our team. His dedication and problem-solving skills were crucial in meeting project deadlines and navigating challenges. I highly recommend Michael to any organization seeking a visionary and skilled Software Architect. He will undoubtedly bring the same level of excellence and innovation to any future endeavor.
references.relationship: Michael was senior to Marcus but didn't manage Marcus directly
references.position: Vue, Nuxt, Node, Frontend developer, JavaScript developer, Web developer

references.name: Luiz Lima

I have personally experienced their superb leadership, acute perspicacity, and steadfast dedication to providing clients with outstanding results. He has a wonderful capacity for motivating and inspiring his team members, creating a cooperative atmosphere where each person is encouraged to offer their best effort. Leading by example, Michael exhibits an infectious work ethic and commitment to excellence. Their ability to design reliable and scalable solutions is impressive, and their meticulous attention to detail guarantees that every component of the software satisfies the highest requirements. We have collaborated on a few projects together.
references.relationship: Luiz worked with Michael on the same team
